context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Launch-process now handles detached spawn failures, and its initial release changeset includes the downstream ENOENT fix before vault-seed-ready publication.
current_tasks: Commit 0eb1a193 fixed launchDetachedProcess so missing host tools such as xdg-open emit through onError instead of crashing the caller with an unhandled child-process error.
Commit 5a2ca8e6 folded that detached spawn fix into .changeset/launch-process-leaf.md instead of stacking a second changeset before first publication.
refarm release preflight --selection vault-seed-ready --json is ready and includes @refarm.dev/launch-process with lint/type-check/test/build required checks.
pnpm exec changeset status --since main reports @refarm.dev/launch-process in the minor initial-release set and @refarm.dev/cli in patch for the compatibility re-export.
next_actions: Use refarm release preflight --selection vault-seed-ready --json before heavier vault-seed publication checks; avoid broad gates until another concrete package slice needs them.

Continue auditing vault-seed-ready SDK exports before publication; keep product CLI names where they describe the Refarm app, but make reusable primitives product-neutral before they become public contracts.
If vault-seed reports another concrete SDK defect, prefer fixing it in the Refarm package root and folding release notes into the existing package changeset when still pre-publication.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
